title: mentha longifolia var. cordifolia
intro: Mentha longifolia var. cordifolia, also known as Horehound, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Horehound has been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Horehound include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
